caption: A person wearing a blue and gray plaid shirt is seated at a light-colored wooden table in a room with gray carpeting and chairs. The person interacts with a black electronic device and its packaging, which includes a white box and a black carrying case. In the beginning, the person holds the black device with both hands, adjusting a part of its top. As time progresses, the person removes a small orange and gray component from the device. By the end of the sequence, the person holds a blue smartphone, interacting with its screen or side buttons while the black device rests on the table nearby. The background remains consistent, showing the edge of the wooden table and a few chairs, with no legible text or logos visible on any of the objects.
